query: Terrion Arnold Detroit Lions Commissioner's Exempt List released waived NFL transaction status July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research on Terrion Arnold's NFL transaction status. Here's the bottom line:

**Current status (as of July 12, 2026): Terrion Arnold is an unsigned free agent and is NOT on the Commissioner's Exempt List.**

**Timeline of transactions:**
- **June 29, 2026** — Detroit Lions **waived/released** him (hours after a judge set his $1M bond)
- **July 6, 2026** — He **cleared waivers unclaimed**, becoming a free agent
- **July 10–12, 2026** — Still **unsigned**; drawing interest from the Texans (worked him out), Jets, Colts, and Seahawks

**On the Commissioner's Exempt List specifically:** He has not been placed on it. The Exempt List applies only to players under contract, so it can't apply while he's an unsigned free agent. Reporting treats it as a *prospective* risk — the NFL could place him on the list once he signs with a team, which is cited as a key deterrent for interested teams (they'd have to keep paying him while he sits). A Florida judge also denied the state's request for a GPS ankle monitor on July 10-11, which was viewed as helping his chances of playing in 2026.

He faces eight felony charges (kidnapping and armed robbery) from a February 2026 incident in Tampa. Full structured findings with sources and data points have been submitted.

sources.title: Lions Waive CB Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: The Lions have waived cornerback Terrion Arnold, per a team announcement. The former first-round pick was recently charged with eight felonies in Florida stemming from a series of incidents in February.

sources.title: Arnold clears waivers, becomes free agent amid court case
sources.snippet: Arnold cleared waivers on Monday, meaning no NFL team claimed his contract following his release by the Lions.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold, former Lions CB, a free agent after clearing waivers
sources.snippet: Arnold, 23, was released by the Lions on June 29 after he was arrested in connection to an alleged armed robbery and kidnapping. He cleared waivers Monday, making him a free agent eligible to sign elsewhere.

sources.title: Former Lions CB Terrion Arnold draws interest from 4 NFL teams
sources.snippet: Arnold remains a free agent and has NOT been placed on the Commissioner's Exempt List, though the NFL reserves this right. Four teams interested: Texans, Jets, Colts, Seahawks.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold clears waivers
sources.snippet: No team was sufficiently interested to claim the balance of his contract on waivers. Arnold passed through waivers unclaimed.

sources.title: Former Detroit Lions CB Terrion Arnold Scores Legal Victory Ahead of Trial
sources.snippet: A Florida judge denied the state's request to place him on a GPS ankle monitor while he awaits trial on felony kidnapping and robbery charges.

sources.title: Former Lions CB Terrion Arnold worked out for Texans, received interest from three other teams
sources.snippet: The Lions released former first-round pick CB Terrion Arnold last month after arrest on felony charges. Arnold worked out for the Texans and received interest from other teams.

sources.title: Agent testifies that Colts, Jets, Seahawks, and Texans have inquired about Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: The core question is whether he'll be practicing or playing football in 2026, relevant to the GPS monitor hearing.

Number of felony charges Arnold faces
Number of NFL teams reported interested in Arnold
